debug_info.goal:
T : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝⁵ : LinearOrder T
inst✝⁴ : TopologicalSpace T
inst✝³ : OrderBot T
inst✝² : OrderTopology T
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSpace T
inst✝ : BorelSpace T
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
𝓕 : Filtration T mΩ
⊢ 𝓕.predictable ≤ Prod.instMeasurableSpace

failed_attempts:
apply MeasurableSpace.generateFrom_le
  intro s hs
  cases hs with
  | Ioc hA _ => exact measurableSet_Ioc.prod (𝓕.le _ _ hA)
  | bot hA => exact (MeasurableSet.singleton _).prod (𝓕.le _ _ hA)

rw [Filtration.predictable]
  apply MeasurableSpace.generateFrom_le
  rintro _ (⟨t, u, A, _, rfl, hA⟩ | ⟨A, rfl, hA⟩)
  · exact MeasurableSet.prod measurableSet_Ioc (𝓕.le _ _ hA)
  · exact MeasurableSet.prod isClosed_singleton.measurableSet (𝓕.le _ _ hA)

rw [predictable]
  apply sup_le
  · apply MeasurableSpace.generateFrom_le
    rintro _ ⟨t, u, -, s, hs, rfl⟩
    exact MeasurableSet.prod measurableSet_Ioc (𝓕.le t s hs)
  · apply MeasurableSpace.generateFrom_le
    rintro _ ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩
    exact MeasurableSet.prod (measurableSet_singleton ⊥) (𝓕.le ⊥ s hs)

rw [predictable]
